risks.title: CAA not enabled
risks.description: The domain does not contain a valid Certification Authority Authorization (CAA) record. A CAA record indicates which Certificate Authorities (CAs) are authorized to issue certificates for a domain.

risks.title: CSP is not implemented
risks.description: No valid Content Security Policy is implemented. This increases the risk of XSS and clickjacking attacks.

risks.title: DMARC policy is p=quarantine
risks.description: The DMARC policy should be set to p=reject for maximum protection.

actual.propertyValue: v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; pct=100; rua=mailto:f199659956@rua.easydmarc.us,mailto:rua@lancesoft.com; ruf=mailto:f199659956@ruf.easydmarc.us,mailto:ruf@lancesoft.com; fo=1; [inherited from lancesoft.com]

risks.title: 'FTP' port open
risks.description: The 'FTP' service is running and exposed to the internet. The configuration of the server should be reviewed and unnecessary ports closed.

risks.title: HTTP does not redirect to HTTPS
risks.description: The domain is still accessible over HTTP. All HTTP requests should be redirected to HTTPS.

risks.title: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) not enforced
risks.description: Without HSTS enforced, people browsing this site are more susceptible to man-in-the-middle attacks. The server should be configured to support HSTS.

risks.title: HTTPS redirect not supported
risks.description: HTTPS is the standard protocol for secure communication on the internet. All redirects should be performed over HTTPS.

risks.title: SSL expired
risks.description: SSL certificate has expired. The certificate will need to be renewed for connections to your domain to be trusted.

risks.title: SSL expires in less than 20% of its total valid period
risks.description: SSL certificate has less than 20% of its total valid period remaining. The certificate will need to be renewed to avoid expiry.

expected.propertyValue: [has more than 20% of its valid period remaining]

risks.title: Hostname does not match SSL certificate
risks.description: The site's hostname does not match the SSL certificate. The domain name should be added to the certificate, either as a Subject Alternative Name or as the Common Name.

actual.propertyValue: ext.lancesoft.com does not match any of these Subject Alternative Names in the SSL certificate: *.prod.phx3.secureserver.net, prod.phx3.secureserver.net

risks.title: Weak cipher suites supported in TLS 1.2
risks.description: Weak cipher suites can potentially be broken by a well resourced attacker, and should not be supported by the server unless very old devices or browsers must be supported.

risks.title: Unmaintained page detected
risks.description: This domain appears to be unmaintained based on indicators like page content or status code. Unmaintained pages expand the attack surface for malicious actors.

risks.title: OpenSSH 8.0 has potential vulnerabilities
risks.description: OpenSSH 8.0 has vulnerabilities which might be exploitable under certain conditions. Affected domains should be checked to determine which vulnerabilities might pose a risk.

risks.title: X-Content-Type-Options is not nosniff
risks.description: Browsers may interpret files as a different MIME type than what is specified in the Content-Type HTTP header. This can lead to MIME confusion attacks.

risks.title: X-Frame-Options is not deny or sameorigin
risks.description: Browsers may display this website's content in frames. This can lead to clickjacking attacks.

risks.title: X-Powered-By header exposed
risks.description: The X-Powered-By header reveals information about specific technology used on the server. This information can be used to exploit vulnerabilities. The server configuration should be changed to remove this header.

otherChecks.title: Not vulnerable to CVE-2014-0160 (Heartbleed)
otherChecks.description: A bug in OpenSSL's implementation of the TLS heartbeat extension allows access to portions of memory on the targeted host e.g. cryptographic keys and passwords.

otherChecks.title: Not vulnerable to CVE-2014-3566 (POODLE)
otherChecks.description: The server does not support SSLv3, and is not vulnerable to the POODLE attack.

otherChecks.title: Not vulnerable to CVE-2015-0204 (FREAK)
otherChecks.description: The server does not offer RSA_EXPORT cipher suites, so clients are not vulnerable to the FREAK attack.

otherChecks.title: Not vulnerable to CVE-2015-4000 (Logjam)
otherChecks.description: The server is using strong Diffie-Hellman parameters and is not vulnerable to the Logjam attack.
